Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time playing with Maiko.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, hey! What do you wanna do next?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's your turn, okay? You get to pick![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Aww, I hate the see-saw! It makes my butt hurt...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, yay! I love climbing on top of stuff![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We did that already! I wanna do something different![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like it'll be getting dark soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Can we stay here a little longer?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After playing together, she seems[n]to have taken a liking to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've become acquainted with[n]Maiko, the grade-schooler.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}All they ever do is fight. And... just the other day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They said they were getting a divorce.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I told them not to, but they won't listen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}They probably don't care about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Hey... You'll play with me again later, right? We're friends now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm here on {f 0 1 2}Mondays, Wednesdays, and Saturdays{f 0 1 27}... You have to come see me, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Maiko,[n]then went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
